title: Vienna Blood
writer: Viktor Léon, Leo Stein, Axel Eggebrecht
actors: Willy Fritsch, Maria Holst, Hans Moser
plot: Count Wolkersheim attends the 1815 Vienna Congress to negotiate,to the Countess joy. Political concerns and music mix in a waltzing city, their apparently opposite attitudes testing their love. Will she behave or will he learn to ...
